framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis SUSTAINED, Iran missile entered Turkey 4th time (NATO shot down), Haifa refinery fire
history.note: Day 37 PM. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED + NATO INCIDENT: (1) IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (2) Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves cruise+drones at Israel; (3) ★★★ Iran ballistic missile entered TURKISH airspace — shot down by NATO air/missile defenses, 4th incident (Turkey MoD); (4) Haifa refinery FIRE from intercepted missile debris (Israel Fire Service) — infrastructure damage DESPITE interception; (5) Netanyahu WIDENED Lebanon invasion, IDF troops skied from Syria into southern Lebanon (IDF footage); (6) 1 IDF soldier (19yo) killed in Lebanon, 1 Lebanese soldier killed at Tyre checkpoint; (7) Trump TruthSocial: 'serious discussions with NEW, AND MORE REASONABLE, REGIME' + 'great progress' BUT threatens to obliterate Kharg Island + energy sites + water facilities; (8) Rubio: Pentagon 'preparing optionality' for Hormuz; (9) HRANA: 3,486 verified deaths (1,568 civilians inc 236 children, 1,211 military); (10) Iran internet blackout 725+ hours (31 days). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT 3 INDEPENDENT fronts active + NATO airspace violations = war WIDENING. Source: Turkey MoD/Sky News/Bloomberg/Fox/NBC/Reuters

Source: Bloomberg/NYT/CBS/Guardian/Wikipedia/Spectrum/ISW/IDF

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC baseline) BUT 100+ missile joint salvo Apr 1 with Houthis+Hezbollah
history.note: Day 42. ★★★★★ PATTERN BREAK — JOINT SALVO: (1) IRGC launched NEW coordinated wave: 100+ heavy missiles + attack drones + 200+ rockets — JOINT with Houthis + Hezbollah (Moneycontrol/TheHindu Apr 1); (2) Houthis '3rd military operation targeting sensitive Israeli targets with ballistic missiles' — jointly with Iran + Hezbollah (Yahya Saree statement); (3) This is SIGNIFICANT REVERSAL from 1-2/day declining pattern — suggests coordinated multi-front salvo capability REMAINS; (4) Trump claims Pezeshkian asked for ceasefire (TruthSocial Apr 1) — Iran calls it 'false, baseless'; (5) IRGC 18-company deadline at 20:00 Tehran Apr 1 — UNTESTED at pipeline time; (6) A-10 Warthogs deploying to Hormuz as ground operation option emerges (ArmyRecognition Apr 1); (7) Argentina designated IRGC terrorist org (Mar 31); (8) US KIA: 15+ confirmed + 300+ wounded; (9) IDF continuing Tehran strikes; (10) Iran: HRANA 3,486+ killed. CRITICAL: Joint salvo BREAKS the 1-2/day pattern — must monitor if this is one-off coordinated show-of-force or return to mass salvos. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts CONFIRMED ACTIVE simultaneously. Source: Moneycontrol/TheHindu/ArmyRecognition/Reuters/CNBC/Axios

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, 2 COSCO state ships transited, Bessent: US will 'retake' Hormuz + escort plans)
history.note: Day 37 PM. ★★★★★ TRANSIT SIGNALS: (1) ★★★ Bloomberg Mar 30: TWO COSCO Shipping Corp container ships exited Hormuz — FIRST major Chinese state-backed company vessels since war began; (2) ★★★ Bessent (Treasury Sec): 'Over time, US is going to retake control of the straits, freedom of navigation through US escorts or multinational escort' (Bloomberg); (3) Rubio: Pentagon 'preparing optionality' for Hormuz (ABC); (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) Iran blocked previous Chinese ships Mar 27 BUT now allowing COSCO = ESCALATION OF FRIENDLY ACCESS; (6) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (7) Oxford: impassable until May; (8) Brent USD115.35 (+2.47%). COSCO transit = significant — if state-backed Chinese majors flowing, trickle may accelerate. Bessent 'retake' = strongest US official statement on Hormuz control yet. Source: Bloomberg/ABC/Sky/USNI

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, 2 COSCO state ships transited Monday, Trump 20-ship claim UNVERIFIED)
history.note: Day 38. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) Reuters Mar 30: 2 COSCO Shipping Corp container ships passed through Hormuz on 2ND ATTEMPT Monday — first major Chinese state-backed company vessels since war; (2) NYT: Chinese ships transited suggesting Iran 'could be relaxing stranglehold' but shows 'Tehran's enduring control'; (3) Trump claimed 20 ships allowed Monday — UNVERIFIED; (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) NPR: Iran parliament pursuing formal codification of Hormuz sovereignty + fee collection; (6) Bessent: 'US will retake control of straits through escorts'; (7) Netanyahu: floated rerouting all Gulf energy pipelines across Saudi to Red Sea to Israeli ports — long-term bypass plan; (8) ~3,000 vessels still waiting; (9) IRGC yuan-denominated toll via Larak. COSCO transit = significant signal but macro picture unchanged: 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Reuters/NYT/NPR/CBS/Bloomberg

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, COSCO 2 ships confirmed, Kuwaiti tanker STRUCK at Dubai — transit recovery THREATENED)

Still 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Bloomberg/Reuters/NYT/NPR/USNI/CBS

Tanker attack causing REVERSE flow — ships LEAVING ports, not entering strait. Source: Guardian/CNBC/USNI/Reuters

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: ESCALATING — China-Pakistan 5-point plan formally presented; CNN: China positioning as US-Iran peace broker; UNSC divisions deepen
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 43. ★★★★ CHINA INSTITUTIONAL MEDIATION + UNSC GRIDLOCK: (1) China-Pakistan 5-point plan formally presented Mar 31 — immediate cessation, peace talks, civilian protection, Hormuz restoration, overall peace framework (Guardian/Axios/Reuters); (2) CNN Apr 2: 'Is China positioning itself to become a US-Iran peace broker?' — Beijing 'supports mediation efforts', willing to 'maintain communication'; (3) UNSC 2817 adopted demanding Iran cease attacks BUT Russia ceasefire draft FAILED — China/Russia abstained on 2817, criticized as 'unbalanced' (SecurityCouncilReport Apr); (4) Pakistan emerged as key intermediary — backroom Washington-Tehran channel (Newsweek); (5) China MFA: Pakistan trip to 'strengthen cooperation' on Iran conflict; (6) 'No evidence' 5-point plan has gained traction (Breitbart); (7) Arms Control Association Apr: 'unclear if Tehran willing to negotiate or Israel would agree'. ASSESSMENT: China moving from rhetorical to INSTITUTIONAL role but zero traction with either belligerent. UNSC gridlocked — competing resolutions cancel each other. Source: CNN/Guardian/Axios/Reuters/SecurityCouncilReport/Newsweek/ArmsControl

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: EXTREME CONTRADICTION — Trump primetime 'nearing completion' + threatens 'extremely hard' 2-3 weeks; Iran FM denies ALL negotiations; USNI: US STILL no Hormuz escort; NatSec Dems demand ceasefire
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 43. ★★★★★ PARADOX AT MAXIMUM: (1) Trump primetime address Apr 1: 'core strategic objectives nearing completion', 'leaving very soon' (NYT/AP/CNBC/Politico); (2) BUT simultaneously threatens 'extremely hard over next 2-3 weeks' (NYT Apr 2); (3) Trump claims Pezeshkian asked for ceasefire — Iran FM: 'false and baseless' (AJE/CBC/Townhall); (4) Iran FM Araghchi: 'no ceasefire but complete end to war', 'no negotiations with America since war began'; (5) Arms Control Association Apr: 'unclear if Tehran willing to negotiate or if Israel would agree'; (6) NatSec Dems (Smith/Meeks/Himes) demand Trump announce ceasefire negotiation (House Armed Services Apr 1); (7) USNI Proceedings Apr: 'US has NOT undertaken naval escorts of commercial shipping' — promised since Mar 12; (8) Hegseth: US can see 'finish line' BUT conceded Iran retains strike ability; (9) DailyMail: Trump shifting from escort vows → demands NATO help → threatens obliterate Kharg = policy whiplash. ASSESSMENT: Maximum rhetoric-reality gap. Victory claims unsupported by operational facts. 3 independent fronts still active. Source: NYT/AP/CNBC/AJE/CBC/USNI/DailyMail/HouseArmedServices/ArmsControl

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: FRAGMENTED — 3 competing frameworks ALL failing: US 15-pt REJECTED, UNSC 2817 adopted but Russia draft FAILED, China-Pakistan 5-pt UNTESTED; Iran links Lebanon to any deal
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 43. ★★★ NO VIABLE EXIT PATH: (1) Iran rejected US 15-point peace plan (Wikipedia); (2) Iran insists Lebanon must be part of any ceasefire — linking fronts (Wikipedia); (3) Iran FM: 'no ceasefire but complete end to war' — REJECTS ceasefire framing (AJE); (4) UNSC 2817 adopted (demanding Iran cease attacks) BUT competing Russia ceasefire draft FAILED — China/Russia abstained, criticized as 'unbalanced' (SecurityCouncilReport Apr); (5) China-Pakistan 5-point plan formally presented but 'no evidence gained traction' (Breitbart); (6) Iran says has 'necessary will' to end war but seeks 'guarantees for peace' (ToI); (7) Arms Control Association Apr: 'unclear if Tehran willing to negotiate'; (8) Apr 6 energy infrastructure deadline 4 DAYS away — if expires without deal, strikes resume on energy targets. ASSESSMENT: UNSC gridlocked (competing resolutions cancel each other), US plan REJECTED, China plan UNTESTED. Iran's Lebanon linkage = structural impediment. Apr 6 deadline = next crisis point. Source: Wikipedia/AJE/SecurityCouncilReport/ToI/ArmsControl/Guardian

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近

fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 43. ★★★★ COST ESCALATION + INSTITUTIONAL CHECK ABSENT: (1) Gas .06/gal national Apr 1 (SmartAsset/Yahoo/AAA/NYT) — crossed  threshold, rising daily, no end in sight; (2) CA .87+/gal (Time); (3) US KIA: 13 (NYT/Pentagon) to 15 (Wikipedia); (4) ★★★ Intercept Apr 1: Pentagon COVERING UP casualty figures — 520+ wounded total, 15 troops wounded single Friday Saudi base attack; (5) War Powers vote DELAYED — House Dems waiting until mid-April recess return (Axios/Democracy Now); (6) Senate War Powers FAILED 53-47 party line, only Rand Paul crossed (AJE); (7) NatSec Dems (Smith/Meeks/Himes) demand ceasefire negotiation in national address (House Armed Services Apr 1); (8) IEA warns supply crunch worsening April — gas prices likely CONTINUE rising; (9) S&P 500 down -0.52% Apr 2 (Fakta.co), Brent volatile -115; (10) Apr 6 energy infrastructure strike deadline 4 DAYS away. ASSESSMENT: Domestic cost pressure BUILDING rapidly (+ gas + casualty coverup) but institutional checks ABSENT (Congress recess + party-line voting). Mid-April vote = next political inflection. Apr 6 deadline = potential price shock. Source: SmartAsset/Yahoo/AAA/NYT/Intercept/Axios/AJE/HouseArmedServices/IEA/Fakta.co

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
